taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Infrastructure Engineer
core_skills: AI infrastructure, Machine learning infrastructure, Container orchestration, Kubernetes, FastAPI
skill_match_scores: AI infrastructure:1.0, Machine learning infrastructure:1.0, Container orchestration:1.0, Kubernetes:1.0, FastAPI:1.0
must_have_quals: Deep experience building AI infrastructure, Experience working closely with researchers to build high-performance systems at massive scale for novel use cases, Ability to push massive compute clusters to their limits, Core contributor to a novel container orchestration platform built in-house, Develop and maintain FastAPI and gRPC APIs for agentic infrastructure, Use Terraform to stand up and evolve complex infrastructure for both research and production, Collaborate with research teams to optimize systems for novel AI training runs and experimental applications, Deep experience working on large-scale machine learning infrastructure, Ability to reason about training at scale, identifying bottlenecks and engineering solutions to optimize system performance, Ability to build new things from 0-1 quickly, and then scale them 1,000,000x
core_responsibilities: Push massive compute clusters to their limits. You will be a core contributor to a novel container orchestration platform built in-house by our team to scale far beyond what’s possible with systems like Kubernetes, Develop and maintain FastAPI and gRPC APIs that serve as the interface for our agentic infrastructure used both in training and production, Use Terraform to stand up and evolve complex infrastructure for both research and production, Collaborate with research teams to stand up and optimize systems for novel AI training runs and experimental applications
job_summary: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. As a Software Engineer on the Agent Infrastructure team, you will build and scale systems to train highly capable agentic models and maintain the production platform for agentic products.
